recipe: next_gru, 5f, 50ep, bs2048, max-lr 3e-3, grad-accum 1, compile+tf32, fp32 (DISABLE_AMP)
_caveats: HGI built on canonical Massive-STEPS check-ins (parse_city category_map; spot=fine, category=7-class). HGI substrate covers 29945/42795 POIs (~70%, region-covered). Windowing params identical to the stride-1 Check2HGI cat ceiling (stride-1, MIN_SEQ=10, window-9); row-count gate vs check2hgi_dk_ovl/istanbul not runnable (that engine absent on this box). STAN Istanbul data preserved separately (output/baselines/stan/istanbul/Istanbul_stan_checkins.parquet).
